title: Web Application Federal Office
description: Development of a modern web application for the Federal Office for Information Security. The application must be responsive, accessible, and comply with BSI technical guidelines.
authority: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik (BSI)

title: DevOps Consulting Digitalization
description: Consulting and implementation of a CI/CD platform for multiple federal agencies. Includes container orchestration and infrastructure-as-code migration.

title: Backend Specialist Application
description: Backend development for a new citizen service platform. The system must handle high load, comply with DSGVO, and integrate with existing legacy systems.

title: IT Security Analysis
description: Comprehensive security audit and penetration testing of government IT infrastructure including web applications, networks, and internal services.

title: Database Migration Project
description: Migration of legacy Oracle databases to PostgreSQL as part of the federal open-source strategy. Includes data migration, testing, and documentation.

title: Mobile App Citizen Services
description: Development of a cross-platform mobile application for citizen services. The app must run on iOS and Android, support offline functionality, and meet accessibility standards.

title: Cloud Migration Government Agency
description: Migration of on-premise infrastructure to a hybrid cloud setup using AWS and Azure. Includes security hardening, cost optimization, and staff training.

title: Go Microservices Platform
description: Design and implementation of a microservices platform for a federal data exchange system. Services must communicate via gRPC, be containerized with Docker, and orchestrated via Kubernetes.

title: Frontend Procurement Portal
description: Frontend development for the new federal procurement portal. Must integrate with the backend via a REST API and comply with WCAG 2.1 accessibility guidelines.

title: Project Management Digitalization Initiative
description: IT project management for a large-scale digitalization program coordinating multiple agencies. Requires experience with agile methods and IT governance.
